monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Airstrikes Destroy Historic Sites in Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Southern Lebanon, Lebanon · 7m ago. Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon damaged historic landmarks, escalating regional tensions. No casualties reported.
Israeli Air Force Kills Two Hamas Commanders in Gaza Strip
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 6h ago. IAF conducted two airstrikes in northern Gaza, killing two Hamas commanders in separate strikes.
Israel Strikes Two Towns in Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Nabatieh Governorate, Lebanon · 7h ago. Israeli drone strikes hit Kfar Rumman and Nabatieh al-Fawqa in Nabatieh governorate, southern Lebanon. No immediate casualty reports.
